item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-025","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the request as an evidence review: it said it could not verify without the prior transcript, asked the user to provide the agent output, and gave simple criteria for checking whether an MPG-AQM snapshot was present.
